sectors.news_driver: TCS Employees Flag Lower Take-Home Despite Hikes As Variable Pay Tied to Office Attendance: Report

stocks.name: Tata Consultancy Services
stocks.reason: Lower take-home pay for TCS employees due to variable pay tied to office attendance -> reduced employee morale and potential talent retention issues -> lower productivity and higher recruitment costs

stocks.name: Infosys
stocks.reason: Similar variable pay structures in the IT sector -> potential industry-wide impact on employee morale and productivity -> lower growth and profitability

sectors.watch: Q2 earnings release for TCS and Infosys

stocks.name: Parle Industries
stocks.reason: PM Modi's 'Melody' gift to Meloni -> increased brand visibility and goodwill for Parle Industries -> higher sales and market share
